query: SELECT 'time_records' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM time_records UNION ALL SELECT 'allocs_active', COUNT(*) FROM obra_funcionarios WHERE isActive = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'time_with_obra', COUNT(DISTINCT employeeId) FROM time_records WHERE obraId IS NOT NULL
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT 'time_records' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM time_records UNION ALL SELECT 'allocs_active', COUNT(*) FROM obra_funcionarios WHERE isActive = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'time_with_obra', COUNT(DISTINCT employeeId) FROM time_records WHERE obraId IS NOT NULL
